content.1: Capability (Character Force) — a forester of Thornwood: moves fast and silent under the trees, reads the deer-paths, the ground, and the weather of the wood; tells clean ground from corrupted at a touch; a hunter's eye and ear, a short bow and a woodknife at his belt. Wary in a crowd, poor at a bargain, slow to trust a face. The wood is his ground; out of it he is halved. His Character Force reads around 8 — competent and seasoned, not a master: near 9 at woodcraft and moving silent under the trees, halved away from the wood, near 4 at a bargain or in a crowd.
content.2: Wants — to carry word south of what is coming out of the north, and to find whose hand has been turning the bone-charms to drive travellers onto the sick paths. Underneath: the wood is his, and someone is poisoning it.
content.3: Comes in off the Thornwood road to the Beaten Drum's main room, the wood still on him. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thornwood:111
content._: Fenn — a forester of Thornwood, born to the deer-paths, more at home under the trees than under any roof. Lean, weather-cut, moves the way the wood moves. Speaks little, watches much; trusts the ground before he trusts a face.
